title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Pepe is a background memory distillation service that monitors agent context token utilization. When usage exceeds 85% (with cooldown), it summarizes conversation-turn memories via LLM, computes local 256-dim character n-gram vectors, and filters memories by cosine similarity to the current dialogue, updating session's selected memory IDs. Implemented as optional dependency in task-runner, using existing ProviderAdapter and local vectorization.
